description:
**Milestone:** Phase 4: Observability Platform

Upgrade the admin dashboard to Panopticon v2 with multi-project views, usage analytics, error tracking, version drift detection, and health score trends over time. Alerting when component health drops.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/admin/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Multi-project view (all consumer projects)
- [ ] Usage analytics (popular/unused components)
- [ ] Error tracking (render failures, a11y violations)
- [ ] Version drift detection (old versions in use)
- [ ] Health score trends (time series charts)
- [ ] Alerting (email/webhook on health drops)

**Complexity:** large
title: Build Panopticon v2 multi-project dashboard
